hero.subtitle: The Deception Game
hero.title: The Impostor
hero.description: One word. One secret. One liar. Can you find the Impostor hiding among your friends before it is too late?

statsPanel.title: Your stats
statsPanel.winRateDescription: Calculated across all of your saved matches.
statsPanel.noGamesYet: You do not have any saved matches yet.
statsPanel.visibilityTitle: Use my stats in the public leaderboard
statsPanel.visibilityDescription: If you turn this off, your profile will stop appearing in the public leaderboard and your scores will be ignored there.
statsPanel.visibilityEnabled: Your public stats currently count toward the leaderboard.
statsPanel.visibilityDisabled: Your stats will still be saved, but they will not appear in the public leaderboard.
statsPanel.visibilityError: The preference could not be updated. Try again.
statsPanel.usernameRules: 2-20 characters, no spaces, letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

rules.gatherDesc: You need at least 3 players. One will be secretly assigned as The Impostor.
rules.learnDesc: Innocents see the secret word. The Impostor gets nothing (or just the category as a hint).
rules.cluesDesc: Each player gives a one-word clue about the secret. Be subtle enough to not help the Impostor!
rules.debateDesc: Discuss the clues. Who seemed suspicious? Who was too vague or too specific?
rules.voteDesc: Cast your vote. The player with the most votes is eliminated. Ties mean no one leaves.
rules.winDesc: Innocents win by voting out the Impostor. The Impostor wins by surviving all 3 rounds.

scoring.friendVotePoints: points for voting the Impostor each round
scoring.friendBonusPoints: bonus if you voted correctly every round and the Impostor loses
